scene.message: {nl}
{nl}
Ms. Natsumi: Ngh... sorry{nl} for being so clumsy.{waitkey}{ret}
Nanjo: Now then, I'll{nl} take my leave.{waitkey}{ret}
Yukino: It's true, Nanjo.{waitkey}There's no way out.{waitkey}{ret}
Yukino: There is.{waitkey}But to do it, we need{nl} a few more people.{waitkey}{ret}
Nanjo: What do you mean?{waitkey}{ret}
Ayase: Well, you see...{waitkey}{ret}
